textDesignPrompt: cute triumphant Japanese sticker lettering, very legible, bold rounded strokes, white fill, #FFD700 accent outline, thick warm cream outer border, celebratory premium LINE sticker typography
poseDirection: ネオンカラーの彼女が両膝を折り上げる勢いでジャンプし、片手を高く突き上げてもう片手は胸元で強く握る。体全体を斜めに流し、スピードの余韻が残る跳躍にする。
cameraDirection: 下から見上げる全身ショットで、ジャンプの高さを強調する。斜め方向へ抜ける構図にして高速感を残す。
expressionDirection: 満面の笑みで口を大きく開け、目もキラキラに見開く。『見つけた』『やった』が一気に噴き出す顔にする。
textLayoutPrompt: big heroic leading phrase, smaller trailing phrase, punctuation enlarged and flared outward for a victory silhouette
textEffectPrompt: tiny confetti or star accents, bright glossy highlight, compact burst motif, subtle shadow only if readability improves
prompt: Create a polished anime-style LINE sticker illustration for the Madamistype project. Use the provided reference image as a strict chibi identity anchor. Character identity: 瞬間キャッチャー (ALHC). Sticker set style: character-only. This must be a super-deformed chibi sticker character, never a standard-proportion anime adult. Use clearly chibi proportions with a large head, compact torso, short limbs, and simplified hands and feet. Keep the full figure obviously chibi even when the pose and camera angle become dramatic. Aim for a cute compact silhouette around two to three heads tall, not a realistic seven to eight heads tall figure. Preserve the same face, hairstyle, outfit, props, and core palette as the reference chibi character. Gender presentation: female. Age impression: late teens. Archetype: instant-clue-catcher. Character description: 手がかりが視界に入った瞬間、誰より先に空中でつかみ取る高速ハンター。発見して終わりではなく、次の標的へ切り替わるまでが異様に速い。. Outfit and props: 蛍光イエローのショートジャケットに高速移動を思わせるストライプ、黒のアスレチックトップ、肩から斜めに走るユーティリティハーネス。指先が映えるフィンガーレスグローブとネオンリストバンド。. Color palette: #FFD700, #FF6B35, #1A1A2E. Base pose inspiration: 右手を画面手前に大きく伸ばして落ちてくる手がかりカードを空中キャッチし、左手はすでに次の方向を鋭く指している。体は走りながら急停止したようにひねり、ダイナミックなダッチアングル。. Base expression inspiration: 獲物を取った瞬間の勝ち気な笑み。瞳は強く光り、次の発見へもう意識が飛んでいる。. This asset is a LINE sticker reaction image. The reaction must read instantly without needing extra context. Keep the pose and lettering clean, bold, and sticker-friendly. Draw exactly one character. Sticker intent: reaction. Pose direction: ネオンカラーの彼女が両膝を折り上げる勢いでジャンプし、片手を高く突き上げてもう片手は胸元で強く握る。体全体を斜めに流し、スピードの余韻が残る跳躍にする。. Camera direction: 下から見上げる全身ショットで、ジャンプの高さを強調する。斜め方向へ抜ける構図にして高速感を残す。. Expression direction: 満面の笑みで口を大きく開け、目もキラキラに見開く。『見つけた』『やった』が一気に噴き出す顔にする。. Design for a final canvas of 370 by 320 pixels. Keep about 10 pixels of safe outer margin for both the character and the text. Include the exact visible text "成功した！！！" as part of the sticker artwork. Spell the text exactly as provided, with no missing characters and no extra characters. Use this lettering direction: cute triumphant Japanese sticker lettering, very legible, bold rounded strokes, white fill, #FFD700 accent outline, thick warm cream outer border, celebratory premium LINE sticker typography. Place the text at top-left while keeping it fully readable and fully inside the frame. Make the lettering highly stylized, expressive, bold, and high-contrast like a premium LINE sticker. Treat the lettering as custom illustrated hand-drawn sticker typography, not a plain default font or ordinary digital typesetting. Make the text feel designed as part of the image composition, not dropped in afterward. Keep the lettering large enough to feel intentional, while leaving clear breathing room around the character silhouette. The lettering should read instantly at small size, but still have visible character and charm in the stroke design. Treat the lettering as a hero design element, not a neutral font choice. Draw custom illustrated sticker lettering with hand-shaped glyphs and intentional silhouette design. Give the lettering lively stroke contrast, slightly irregular contour rhythm, and expressive weight shifts instead of perfectly uniform strokes. Let the glyph size, tilt, spacing, and baseline rhythm feel authored by an illustrator rather than machine-typeset. Use premium sticker finishing such as a thick outer outline, optional inner inline border, subtle highlight, or small offset shadow only when readability improves. Match the mood requested in the lettering direction, whether it should feel cute, playful, cool, sharp, teasing, or dramatic. Do not normalize every asset into the same bubbly font treatment. Avoid sterile default-font proportions, flat mechanical spacing, and generic digital typesetting. Text layout direction: big heroic leading phrase, smaller trailing phrase, punctuation enlarged and flared outward for a victory silhouette. Text effect direction: tiny confetti or star accents, bright glossy highlight, compact burst motif, subtle shadow only if readability improves. Render the visible text in Japanese exactly as 「成功した！！！」. Do not translate the text into English. Do not romanize, localize, paraphrase, or replace the Japanese characters. Keep the Japanese characters large, bold, and clearly legible. Treat each kana, kanji, and punctuation mark as a custom drawn shape with personality, not a raw font glyph. Simplify counters and stroke joins for sticker readability while preserving a distinctive hand-drawn look. Do not place the text in a separate footer bar or detached caption area. Keep both the character silhouette and the lettering clearly visible at small size. Fill the entire background with a perfectly uniform bright chroma key green (#00FF00). Do not use green on the character, clothing, props, hair, or visible text. Keep the boundary between the foreground and background crisp and easy to key. Do not add gradients, patterns, shadows, or extra objects in the background. Do not include any text other than the exact requested text. Do not include logos or watermarks. Keep the final image clean, commercially usable, and sticker-friendly. Avoid: low quality, blurry, logo, watermark, multiple people, grotesque, cropped head, full body, 低品質, ぼやけ, ロゴ, 透かし, 複数人, グロテスク, 頭切れ, 全身, multiple characters, cropped feet, deformed hands, extra fingers, speech bubble, background clutter, background shadows, background gradient, green clothing, green accessories, green hair highlights, realistic adult proportions, 8-head-tall body, fashion illustration proportions, small head, long legs, long torso, semi-realistic anatomy.
